describeSymptoms: Bayyana alamun da ke damun ka
noDiagnosisFound: Ba a sami ganewar asali ba.
serverErrorFetchingConditions: Kuskuren sabar yayin ɗaukar yanayin lafiya.
disclaimerText: Wannan mai binciken alamu yana don bayanin kawai kuma ba zai maye gurbin shawarwarin likita ba.
finishDisclaimer: Da fatan za a tuntubi likita don samun cikakken bincike da magani.
disclaimerText2: SABO: Wannan kayan aiki ba ya ba da shawarwarin likita. An yi niyya don bayanin kawai. Wannan kayan aiki yana amfani da wasu kayan aikin ƙirƙirar hankali na wucin gadi don samar da sakamako, kuma ba madadin shawarwarin likita na ƙwararru, ganewar asali ko magani ba ne. Kada ku taɓa yin watsi da shawarwarin likita na ƙwararru wajen neman magani saboda wani abu da kuka karanta a Shafin Yanar Gizo na LikitaAI. Idan kuna tunanin kuna iya samun gaggawa ta likita, kira likitanku nan da nan.
thankYou: Na gode da amfani da LikitaAI Mai Duba Alamu.
conditions-text: Yanayin lafiya masu zuwa sun dogara ne akan alamomin da kuka bayar. Da fatan za a tuna cewa wannan ba ganewar asali bane na ƙarshe. Koyaushe tuntuɓi ƙwararren ma'aikacin lafiya don samun cikakken ganewar asali da shirin magani.
homecareadvice: Shawarwari na Kula da Lafiya a Gida
seekmedicalcare: Yaushe Ake Neman Kula da Lafiya

home.noDrugInfo: Yi hakuri, babu cikakken bayani game da wannan magani a halin yanzu.
